topic: create-command canon + command-surface improvements (066 benchmark grounded)

noveltyJustification: Claude mirror is EMPTY (parity is two-runtime, not three); mode-completeness gap is a silent-failure path no instrument catches; raw $ARGUMENTS echo is an undocumented 14-file idiom.

focus: RQ5 authoring ergonomics + cross-RQ prioritized backlog
noveltyJustification: F5.1 ties create-benchmark broken-fallback P0 to a general canon gap (no reference-integrity delivery check); backlog names C3.6 as keystone dependency (frontmatter blind spot blocks all frontmatter-rule enforcement).
